content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.dedup_integration
FILE: cosmos/memory/dedup_integration.py (182 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: Deduplication Integration - Hooks into Memory System

Provides non-invasive integration of semantic deduplication.
Shadow architecture pattern.

CLASSES:
- DedupMemoryWrapper: Wraps memory system to add deduplication.

Non-invasive - can be enabled/disable
  Methods: def enable(self, auto_merge: bool=False)
  Methods: def disable(self)
  Methods: async def remember_with_dedup(self, content: str, tags: Optional[list]=None, importance: float=0.5, 
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_dedup_wrapper() -> DedupMemoryWrapper
- async def enable_deduplication(memory_system=None, auto_merge: bool=False)
- def disable_deduplication()
- def get_deduplication_stats() -> Dict
